content: Get Sentry integration playbook from integration_playbook_expert
Request Sentry DSN credentials from user
Create Jest test suite for backend (web3Service, API endpoints, models)
Create Playwright E2E test suite for frontend (booking flow, admin, chat)
Install and configure Sentry in backend with error tracking
Install and configure Sentry in frontend with error boundaries
Add test scripts to package.json for both frontend and backend
Test Sentry error capture with intentional errors
Run full test suite and verify all tests pass
Update plan.md to mark Phase 10.2 and 10.3 as completed
